title: Adam Warlock
content:
{{Otheruses|Adam}} {{CharHub|Adam Warlock|Adam Warlock}} {{Character |image = Adam Warlock Infobox.png |real name = Adam{{Ref|GotGV2}} |alias = {{Alias |codenames = Adam Warlock{{Ref|GotGV3}}}} |nicknames = The Warlock{{Ref|GotGV3}} |species = [[Sovereign]] |gender = Male |title = Warlock |affiliation = {{Affiliation|GOTG3}} |movie = {{Infobox List|{{Collapse|''[[Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2]]'' ([[List of Post-credits Scenes|mid-credits scene]]; mentioned)
}}''[[Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3]]''}} |actor = [[Will Poulter]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|I am the Warlock, Mom, and I am done with being ordered around!|Adam Warlock to [[Ayesha]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} '''Adam Warlock''' is a [[Sovereign]] created by his mother [[Ayesha]] as a living weapon designed to kill the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]]. He was prematurely awakened by [[High Evolutionary]], who tasked him with capturing [[Rocket]], only for Adam's efforts to be thwarted by the Guardians. Adam joined his mother Ayesha on a trip to [[Counter-Earth]] to retrieve Rocket under threat of Sovereign extinction, although High Evolutionary [[Battle of Counter-Earth|destroyed]] the planet, killing Ayesha in the process. Adam eventually tried to [[Attack on Arête Laboratories|attack]] High Evolutionary's [[Arête Laboratories|ship]] but failed yet again and was rescued by [[Groot]]. In redemption, Adam later saved [[Star-Lord]] from dying in space and joined the new Guardians roster under Rocket's leadership. ==Biography== {{MD|Adam Warlock (Earth-199999)}} ===Creation=== ====Ayesha's Revenge==== {{Quote|That, my child, is the next step in [[Sovereign|our]] evolution. More powerful. More beautiful. More capable of destroying the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]].|[[Ayesha]] to [[Sovereign Chambermaid]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2}} [[File:GotGV2 Adam 3.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|left|Adam gestating in a pod]] Following the [[Battle on Ego's Planet]], [[Ayesha]] feared the Sovereign council would seek to punish her for her humiliating defeat at the hands of the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]], which resulted in the destruction of an entire fleet of [[Omnicrafts]]. However, Ayesha remained confident in still being able to exact vengeance against the Guardians. Using an advanced [[Birth Pods|birth pod]], Ayesha began creating a being capable of defeating the Guardians. While showing the Birth Pod to her [[Sovereign Chambermaid|chambermaid]], Ayesha decided to name her creation Adam.{{Ref|GotGV2}} ===The Warlock=== ====Battle with the Guardians==== [[File:Adam flying in space.png|{{AltFloat}}|Adam flies through space to [[Knowhere]]]] {{Quote|And this one was meant to be the Warlock, the apogee of your [[Sovereign|people]]."
"You removed him from his [[Birthing Chamber|cocoon]] early, my liege.|[[High Evolutionary]] to [[Ayesha]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} Adam was soon awoken from his cocoon slightly early by [[High Evolutionary]], who wanted him to find subject [[89P13]]. Adam, taking on the title of the Warlock, flew across space toward [[Knowhere]], where Rocket and the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] were supposed to be located. He spotted Rocket by the window and then proceeded to crash into him. Adam tackled Rocket and crashed him through several rooms until he and Rocket crashed outside of [[Star-Lord]]'s window. [[File:Nebula meets Adam Warlock.png|{{AltFloat}}|Adam is ordered to surrender by [[Nebula]]]] Outside, Adam held Rocket in his hands, but Rocket managed to escape after scrambling out of his grasp. Adam called out to him before being confronted by [[Nebula]], now wearing a jetpack and heavily upgraded cybernetic arm cannon. She demanded him to stand down, but Adam attacked her before she blasted him to an apartment. However, Adam was unfazed by the blast and clashed with Nebula, forcing her to crash in the middle of [[Exitar]]. He pinned Nebula down on the ground and mercilessly punched her repeatedly, heavily damaging and tossing her away into a shop nearby. [[File:Groot vs. Adam.png|{{AltFloat}}|Adam being strangled by [[Groot]]]] Next, [[Groot]] jumped down and toppled Adam. He tried to fight back, but Groot had his roots wrapped around him tightly, forcing Adam to boost himself and Groot up in the air around the Knowhere buildings. He blasted some of the roots off him and then proceeded to rip Groot to shreds by dragging him across the buildings before he came down with only Groot's head remaining. As Groot fled, Adam walked around to find Rocket, only to be ambushed by a [[Yaka Arrow]]. However, the arrow weakly deflected off of Adam's cheek, annoying him. Adam spoke out for [[Kraglin Obfonteri|whoever]] threw the arrow at him. When there was no answer, he merely uttered that the attacker was a baby. [[File:The Warlock cometh.png|{{AltFloat}}|Adam fatally blasts [[Rocket]]]] He finally managed to locate Rocket at the armory, and before Rocket could attack, Adam blasted him with his rays, severely wounding the [[Halfworlders|Halfworlder]]. [[Mantis]] found Adam and attacked, but he grabbed her arm and easily broke it in half before throwing Mantis aside. Next came Star-Lord, who blasted Adam with his [[Quad Blasters]], but this was no use once again. [[File:Adam punching Drax.png|{{AltFloat}}|Adam repeatedly hits [[Drax the Destroyer]]]] Despite doing no harm, Star-Lord distracted Adam long enough for [[Drax the Destroyer]] to sneak up behind him and pick him up. Drax punched Adam across the shops and then threw him over to another shop. Despite that, Adam remained unfazed and then attacked Drax with a headbutt and multiple punches before using his rays to blast Drax. However, Drax survived as Adam approached him and beat the latter senselessly. [[File:Exitar Knowhere.png|{{AltFloat}}|Adam escapes after being wounded]] Adam focused on Drax, allowing a healed Nebula to come up behind him and stab Adam through the chest. A shocked Adam remarked at how that hurt before collapsing to the ground. Adam soon mustered the strength to get up as everyone checked on the injured Rocket. He used this commotion to make his getaway, struggling to fly off back to [[Arête Laboratories]] on [[Counter-Earth]].{{Ref|GotGV3}} ====Recovering and Torture==== [[File:Adam Warlock with his mommy.png|{{AltFloat}}|An injured Adam is held by [[Ayesha]]]] {{Quote|Yes! There's something wrong with me! I was stabbed, your extraordinary phallus!|Adam Warlock to [[High Evolutionary]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} Adam returned to the [[Arête Laboratories]], the main headquarters of [[High Evolutionary]] on [[Counter-Earth]]. [[Ayesha]], devastated over Adam's sorry state, used one of the [[Med-Paks]] to heal the stab injury. She cradled him in her arms, and he commented that it still hurt before the High Evolutionary and his close advisors came to the hanger to confront them. He admonished Ayesha for his failures, while Ayesha rebuked him for failing to underestimate the powers of the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]]. Nonetheless, he mocked Adam for being a so-called false higher being of the [[Sovereign]] people, to which Ayesha defended by telling him he opened his [[Birth Pods|pod]] too early. The High Evolutionary did not care, to which Adam became vigilant over. The High Evolutionary told her that there was still something wrong with him, despite being let out early. Adam spoke up, saying that there was, in fact, something wrong with him as there was a hole in his chest. [[File:Adam in Pain.png|{{AltFloat}}|Adam being pinned by [[High Evolutionary]]]] Adam continued yelling at High Evolutionary; however, the High Evolutionary started to hurdle him against the wall, using his gravity powers. The High Evolutionary reprimanded Ayesha for not only failing to retrieve [[89P13]], but also failing to notify him of his existence without conforming his status. Ayesha pleaded with the High Evolutionary for a second chance to make it up to him. The High Evolutionary agreed and dropped Adam, freeing him from his torture before he warned her if she would fail again, he would destroy the entire Sovereign civilization because it was his right as their creator.{{Ref|GotGV3}} ====Arriving at the Orgoscope==== [[File:Curious Adam.png|{{AltFloat}}|Adam looking around the [[Orgoscope]]]] {{Quote|I really don't enjoy how that's making me feel, actually.|Adam Warlock|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} The [[Sovereign]] had a chance to make it up to [[High Evolutionary]] when the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] were reported to [[Infiltration into the Orgoscope|infiltrate]] the [[Orgoscope]]. Adam and [[Ayesha]] arrived at the Orgoscope, but found a [[Ravagers|ravager]] outside of the premises. They brought him in for interrogation. As a curious Adam admired and examined the room, Ayesha did her work on [[Fitz-Gibbonok]] and his pet, [[Blurp]]. When Fitz-Gibbonok refused to answer, Ayesha told Adam to show him they meant business. An immature Adam took this as a sign to kill him, so he obliterated Fitz-Gibbonok. [[File:Adam Kills Fitz-Gibbonok.png|{{AltFloat}}|Adam obliterates [[Fitz-Gibbonok]]]] Adam looked at his mother, proud of himself for following orders. However, Ayesha only snapped at Adam for being a clumsy fool. Adam tried to defend his actions, but his mother scolded him even further now that Fitz-Gibbonok was dead, and they could no longer get any information from the Guardians. Adam suggested they interrogate his little companion friend, Blurp, but Ayesha responded that Blurp was an animal, and that he could not even speak up. Adam looked at the sad Blurp and started to have doubts about their actions, saying that he did not like how it made him feel. [[File:Regretful Warlock.png |{{AltFloat}}|Adam speaks of his regret about killing]] Master [[Karja]] made fun of Adam, telling Ayesha that he had a moron just like Adam. Just then, [[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|Gamora]] contacted Fitz-Gibbonok through his communicator, to which Ayesha responded by interpreting her as a [[United Ravagers]] crew member. Gamora told her to send a crew to come pick her up as she would send her the coordinates to find the Guardians' ship, the ''[[Bowie]]''. Before they left, Adam noticed Blurp and, feeling sorry for killing his owner, decided to take him with them to [[Counter-Earth]] and promised to train him, much to Ayesha's annoyance.{{Ref|GotGV3}} ====Battle of Counter-Earth==== [[File:Adam Warlock and Blurp.png|{{AltFloat}}|Adam arrives with [[Blurp]] to tackle [[War Pig]]]] {{Quote|What the hell, we're working for the same [[High Evolutionary|boss]]."
"Yes, but I need the credit, chum. To save my entire [[Sovereign|civilization]]. So be a good creepy... thing, and back off.|[[War Pig]] and Adam Warlock|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} They followed the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] to [[Counter-Earth]], where Adam and [[Blurp]] flew out to find the Guardians. He intercepted [[War Pig]] on the ''[[Bowie]]'' and stopped her from killing [[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|Gamora]]. War Pig reminded him they were working for the same boss, the [[High Evolutionary]], and Adam agreed, but he needed to be credited with [[Rocket]]'s capture so he could save his [[Sovereign|civilization]], so he told her to stand down and let him handle it. War Pig refused and tried to retaliate back, but Adam simply grabbed her head and snapped it, decapitating the [[Hell Spawn]]. [[File:War Pig Death.png|{{AltFloat}}|Adam kills [[War Pig]] to capture [[Rocket]]]] Adam then noticed that Gamora was gone, along with Rocket. He came out to the opening of the ship, only to notice that the [[Humanimals]] were looking over at [[Arête Laboratories]]. He looked over there and realized that the lab was starting to lift upwards. He sensed something was wrong and looked down at the inhabitants. He was shocked when the High Evolutionary began to blow up Counter-Earth in an attempt to start over upon realizing it failed at being the perfect society. [[File:Adam Warlock in flight.png|{{AltFloat}}|Adam flies towards [[Ayesha]] to save her]] He was appalled at the senseless genocide, but soon realized [[Ayesha]] had no idea. He dropped Blurp down and then flew around to begin to frantically search for Ayesha and her [[Ayesha's Ship|ship]]. Eventually, he found her still inside of their ship, but with so many explosions going off around him, Adam screamed out to his mother right before Ayesha was killed by the explosions that destroyed her ship. The explosion knocked Adam back into more explosions as Counter-Earth was being destroyed. [[File:Adam Tired Counter-Earth.png|{{AltFloat}}|Adam passes out from exhaustion]] Adam managed to survive the explosions, but he was left exhausted and wounded. Devastated, Adam returned to the ''Bowie'' so he could get Rocket back to the High Evolutionary. As he was on the entrance of the ship, Adam was confronted by Gamora. He tried to fight, but was too exhausted and injured, causing him to merely collapse to the floor.{{Ref|GotGV3}} ====[[Attack on Arête Laboratories]]==== [[File:Adam Awakes.png|{{AltFloat}}|Adam wakes up aboard the ''[[Bowie]]'']] {{Quote|One more step and this [[Blurp|weird thing]] gets it!"
"Don't be rash.|[[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|Gamora]] and Adam Warlock|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} Adam regained consciousness in the ''[[Bowie]]'' to find himself strapped to a bed with metal bars confiding his body. He looked up and saw [[Blurp]] sitting on him. Using his immense strength, Adam broke free from his restrains so he could confront the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] once again. [[File:Adam Blurp Attack.png|{{AltFloat}}|Adam flies towards [[Star-Lord]] and [[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|Gamora]]]] Taking Blurp with him, Adam flew into the space battle between [[Knowhere]] and [[Arête Laboratories]]. He spotted the ship [[Star-Lord]] and [[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|Gamora]] were in and crashed himself inside, causing the ship to spiral out of control. Enraged over the death of [[Ayesha]] and the failures of his [[Attack on Rocket|mission]], Adam got up and moved in to attack Gamora, but she grabbed Blurp and pulled out her [[Godslayer|sword]], threatening that she would kill Blurp, causing Adam to hesitate as the ship crashed onto [[High Evolutionary]]'s ship. [[File:Adam in Burning Ship.png|{{AltFloat}}|Adam inside the burning ship]] Meanwhile, Star-Lord was able to input a self-destruction code into the ship's mainframe before he tackled Gamora and Blurp out of the ship. It then crashed inside the hangar of Arête Laboratories. Adam was trapped inside and could not escape as the fighter ship exploded with Adam still inside. Arête Laboratories was starting to take heavy damage from both the inside and out after being inflicted with catastrophic damage from Knowhere's giant cannon. [[File:Adam Final Battle.png|{{AltFloat}}|A tired Adam attempts to use his powers]] While the Guardians were taking the High Evolutionary's prisoners to safety, Adam was able to survive the explosion and came out to confront [[Groot]], who was escorting the [[Star Children]] in the hallways. Seeing a Guardian in his sights, he screamed with his ray laser powers charged up and ready to shoot. However, before he could do so, Adam passed out once again after surviving another explosion that exhausted him. Groot hesitated at first, but then he decided to take Adam with him since he could not leave Adam to die in the exploding ship.{{Ref|GotGV3}} ====Second Chance==== [[File:Shocked Adam.png|{{AltFloat}}|Adam questions [[Groot]] saving his life]] {{Quote|Why are you doing this? I tried to kill you."
"I am Groot.Translates from Groot's language to: "''Everyone deserves a second chance.''"|Adam Warlock and [[Groot]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} [[Groot]] carried the unconscious Adam in his arms to escort the prisoners across the ship into the opening of [[Knowhere]]. Once the shield was disabled, the Knowhere inhabitants took in the [[Star Children]] while Groot carried Adam over to safety just before he gained consciousness. An awake Adam was surprised by Groot's actions and asked why he saved him, despite the fact that he tried to kill him and the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] before. In response, Groot answered that everyone deserved to have a second chance. [[File:The Creation of Adam.png|{{AltFloat}}|Adam saves [[Star-Lord]] from dying]] While on Knowhere, Adam was inspired by Groot's words and the heroism of the Guardians saving the Star Children and all of the animals from [[Earth]]. Adam watched as the defeated [[High Evolutionary]]'s [[Arête Laboratories|lab]] exploded. As it did, [[Star-Lord]] dropped his [[Star-Lord's Zune|Zune]], so he went back to grab it. Star-Lord attempted to get out of the craft and hurdled himself into space without a spacesuit over to Knowhere. However, debris were blocking his way and Star-Lord started dying from exposure to the deep-space environment, despite the Guardians' attempt to save him. As Star-Lord was dying from the cold space, Adam decided to rescue Star-Lord when the latter nearly froze to death in space. [[File:Adam hug.png|{{AltFloat}}|Adam awkwardly joins the group hug]] He flew in and grabbed Star-Lord before starting to rocket himself back to Knowhere. Star-Lord recovered and the Guardians, including [[Blurp]], made a group hug around him for being alive. Adam was hesitant at first, but he decided to also join in on the hug. Later, Adam sat down and rested up with a blanket being offered to him, which he accepted and wrapped himself to keep warm. [[File:Adam In Knowhere.png|{{AltFloat}}|Adam watches everyone dance together]] As he recovered, he heard the song, "{{WPS|Dog Days Are Over}}", being played on the speakers, which he happily listened to while tears formed in his eyes. After the celebration, [[Kraglin Obfonteri]] then walked over, handed Adam a cup of water and talked with him. As the two had a conversation, Obfonteri remarked that Adam was not a good name and suggested that he think of a better hero name. However, Adam told him that he liked it.{{Ref|GotGV3DS}}{{Ref|GotGV3}} ===The New Guardians=== ====Battle of Krylor==== [[File:Adam Warlock as a Guardian.png|{{AltFloat}}|Adam as a [[Guardians of the Galaxy|Guardian of the Galaxy]]]] {{Quote|{{WPS|Adrian Belew}}. Both solo and his work with {{WPS|King Crimson}}. What about you, Captain?"
"[[Redbone|This one]]'s kind of special.|Adam Warlock and [[Rocket Raccoon]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} The [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] decided to break up as some of the members wanted to explore new opportunities. With a void to fill, Adam took up his decision to join the Guardians under the leadership of [[Rocket Raccoon]]. Sometime later, Adam and the other Guardians were hired to protect some [[Krylorian]] townspeople from a stampede of creatures on [[Krylor]]. [[File:New Guardians of the Galaxy.png|{{AltFloat}}|Adam and [[Guardians of the Galaxy|company]] run into battle]] While waiting for the stampede, they discussed their favorite musical acts, with Adam remarking that he enjoyed {{WPS|Adrian Belew}}, both as soloist and his collaborations with {{WPS|King Crimson}}. Rocket began playing his favorite song "{{WPS|Come and Get Your Love}}", which Adam and the other Guardians enjoyed until the stampede arrived. Adam and the other Guardians then began to charge into battle, on Rocket's word.{{Ref|GotGV3}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== *'''Sovereign Physiology''': Designed to be the best of his race, Adam Warlock possesses superhuman attributes and abilities that no other [[Sovereign]] has. Given that he was released from his cocoon pre-maturely to capture Rocket Raccoon, it can be assumed that his full potential has yet to be reached. **'''Superhuman Strength''': [[File:GOTG Volume 3 Super Bowl Trailer (25).png|thumb|250px|Adam Warlock wrestles [[Drax the Destroyer]]]] Adam Warlock possesses tremendous physical strength unmatched by many of his enemies. From his first encounter with the Guardians of the Galaxy in Knowhere, he was able to easily overpower the Guardians, breaking [[Nebula]]'s body and tossing her away, decapitating [[Groot]], effortlessly breaking [[Mantis]]' arm and physically surpassing [[Drax the Destroyer]], punching him into submission and would have killed him had Nebula not intervened and stabbed him. Later, Adam decapitated [[War Pig]] and is capable of creating huge gaps in the wall of the ''[[Bowie]]'' while chasing [[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|Gamora]]. **'''Superhuman Durability''': Adam Warlock's body possesses tremendous amounts of physical resilience. He was capable of surviving [[Nebula]]'s blasts, [[Groot]] and [[Drax the Destroyer]] physical attacks, [[Kraglin Obfonteri]]'s [[Yaka Arrow]], being telekinetically slammed and pressed into a wall by the [[High Evolutionary]] and a large explosion caused by the destruction of the ''[[Bowie]]''. He was also able to survive being knocked back by the High Evolutionary's [[Arête Laboratories|ship]]. **'''Superhuman Speed''': Warlock can move and react at superhuman speeds, traveling through space from planet to planet. However he can be caught off guard, as shown when he was overpowered by Groot and Drax, and later being stabbed by Nebula. **'''Superhuman Agility''': Adam's agility, balance, and bodily coordination are enhanced to levels beyond the natural physical limits of the finest human athlete. While fighting Drax, he managed to quickly dodge and maneuver in the air to avoid his hits. **'''Superhuman Stamina''': Adam's muscles produce considerably fewer fatigue cells during physical activities than a human's muscles. He can exert himself for long periods without getting tired. **'''Superhuman Reflexes''': Adam's reflexes are enhanced to superhuman levels and are superior to those of the finest human athlete, as he was able to prevent [[Mantis]] from touching him, who is superhumanly agile herself. However, he can still be caught off guard as shown in his fight against Groot, Drax and later he was stabbed by Nebula's sword. **'''Regenerative Healing Factor''': Despite his advanced durability, Adam Warlock can still be injured, as shown when he was stabbed by Nebula's sword, and suffered injuries from the Guardians, and a massive explosion caused by the self-destruction of the ''Bowie'' while trying to capture Rocket. However, he is able to heal quickly enough to save [[Star-Lord]] later, albeit he required a [[Med-Paks|Med-Pak]] to heal from the stab wound by Nebula. **'''Cosmic Energy Manipulation''': Adam can manipulate cosmic energy to use for different purposes. ***'''Energy Blast''': He is able to shoot golden energy blasts from his hands, powerful enough to fatally injure Rocket Raccoon, as well as turn a Ravager into a skeleton. ***'''Flight''': [[File:Adam Warlock vs. Groot.png|thumb|250px|Adam flying while trapping Groot]] Adam can manipulate energy in order to fly at high speeds. ***'''Heat Generation''': Adam has the ability to generate heat from his body, as seen when he fought Groot, burning him. **'''Self-Sustenance''': Adam Warlock is capable of surviving in space without any space suit. Therefore, he was able to save Peter Quill who nearly froze to death in space after the Guardians of the Galaxy defeated High Evolutionary. ===Abilities=== *'''Expert Combatant''': Warlock is a skilled combatant. Being able to fight and defeat members of the Guardians of the Galaxy evenly with the use of his powers, despite all of them being more experienced than Adam. *'''Expert Marksman''': Adam is a skilled marksman, he is able to shot his targets are considerable distances effectively. ==Equipment== ===Vehicles=== *'''[[Ayesha's Ship]]''': Despite being able to fly, Adam often used his mother's ship to get around. ===Other Equipment=== *'''[[Med-Paks|Med-Pak]]''': [[Ayesha]] used a med-pak on Adam Warlock to heal his wound after [[Nebula]]'s attack. ==Facilities== *'''[[Arête Laboratories]]''': ''To be added'' *'''[[Knowhere]]''': ''To be added'' ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Family=== *[[Ayesha]] † - Mother and Creator ===Allies=== *[[Sovereign]] **[[Sovereign Chambermaid]] *[[Guardians of the Galaxy]] - Former Enemies, Teammates and Friends **[[Rocket Raccoon]] - Leader, Former Target and Victim **[[Groot]] - Former Attempted Victim and Savior **[[Kraglin Obfonteri]] **[[Cosmo]] **[[Phyla]] **[[Blurp]] - Temporary Enemy and Pet *[[Star-Lord|Peter Quill/Star-Lord]] - Former Attempted Victim *[[Drax the Destroyer]] - Former Attempted Victim *[[Mantis]] - Former Attempted Victim *[[Nebula]] - Former Attempted Victim and Former Attempted Killer *[[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|Gamora]] - Former Attempted Victim {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Ravagers]] **[[United Ravagers]] ***[[Fitz-Gibbonok]] † - Victim *[[OrgoCorp]] - Temporary Allies **[[High Evolutionary]] - Co-Creator and Former Master *[[Hell Spawn]] **[[War Pig]] † - Temporary Ally and Victim {{Col-end}} ==Trivia== *In the comics, Adam Warlock was created by a group of scientists called the [[Enclave]], who sought to create a perfect being. He has been a member of the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]], and an enemy of both [[Thanos]] and of the [[w:c:marvel:Magus|Magus]], a future evil version of himself. *In the comics, Adam Warlock carried a staff that featured a bird head and wings at the top. The same bird design can be seen on some of the [[Anulax Batteries|Anulax Battery]] containers on the [[Sovereign (Planet)|Sovereign planet]]. *Warlock is a fan of {{WPS|Adrian Belew}}. ==Behind the Scenes== *[[James Gunn]] has said that the [[Birth Pods|Birth Pod]] in the [[Collector]]'s possession that is seen in the [[List of Post-credits Scenes|mid-credits scene]] of ''[[Thor: The Dark World]]'' and ''[[Guardians of the Galaxy (film)|Guardians of the Galaxy]]'' was based on Adam Warlock's cocoon as seen from the comics. *In an earlier treatment, Adam Warlock initially played an integral part in the story of ''[[Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2]]'', as he is one of [[James Gunn]]'s favorite characters. However, when he realized that the film was already full of characters, Gunn ultimately minimized Adam's role from the story, relegating him to a [[List of Post-credits Scenes|post-credits tease]].[https://www.slashfilm.com/adam-warlock-guardians-of-the-galaxy/ Exclusive: Adam Warlock Was Originally a Major Character in ‘Guardians Vol. 2’] *[[Nia DaCosta]]'s original pitch for ''[[The Marvels]]'' included Adam Warlock in the story, but was told by [[Marvel Studios]] that Warlock was already slated to be used in ''[[Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3]]''.[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uU2K0Jq7iEo THE MARVELS Director Talks X-MEN Tease and Her Dream Cyclops / Storm Movie | Nia DaCosta Interview] *Before [[Will Poulter]] was cast, [[Marvel Studios]] had considered {{WPS|Regé-Jean Page}} and {{WPS|George MacKay (actor)|George MacKay}} for the role.[https://twitter.com/Borys_Kit/status/1447701600374386691 Borys Kit on Twitter - October 11, 2021] *Before [[Will Poulter]] was cast, {{WPS|David Corenswet}} auditioned for the role.[https://twitter.com/JacobFisherDF/status/1781825470159343990 Jacob Fisher on Twitter - April 20, 2024] *[[Ben Jenkin]] was a stunt double for [[Will Poulter]] in the role of Adam Warlock. ==References== {{Gallery|Adam Warlock/Gallery}} {{Wq}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{WP}} {{Navbox Guardians of the Galaxy}} [[es:Adam Warlock]] [[fr:Adam Warlock]] [[ru:Адам Уорлок]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2 Characters]] [[Category:Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3 Characters]] [[Category:Sovereign]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Golden Hair]] [[Category:Green Eyes]] [[Category:Mercenaries]] [[Category:Guardians of the Galaxy Members]]
